license_note: Facts and short evidence summaries only; no audio or copyrighted lyrics are included.
purpose: Final source-selected pure-sonic confirmation benchmark, frozen after the dual-Sonic64 architecture and fusion weight were selected on prior development/validation evidence.

split_policy.development: May be used for implementation and hyperparameter selection.
split_policy.validation: All v2/v3 pairs whose outputs were available while selecting the final representation; never deciding evidence.
split_policy.held_out: Exactly 20 final rows selected only by source eligibility, artist disjointness, and exact original-recording catalogue presence after architecture freeze.
split_policy.artist_fields: Primary, featured, and group credited artists are considered; graph connected components are audited transitively.

metric_policy.eligibility: split == held_out and evidence_category == pure_sonic only
metric_policy.primary: 0.5 * Recall@50 + 0.5 * MRR over actual quality-filtered stable-head output; missing sides score zero
metric_policy.scene_guardrail: No held-out pure-sonic scene may regress by more than 10% relative; a zero baseline contribution must not decrease.
metric_policy.manual_judgments: Secondary only and never blended into the deciding primary.
metric_policy.direction: Query to exact original counterpart; derivative target versions never count.
metric_policy.tail_artist_policy: The visible top five remain artist-diverse. Positions 6-50 deduplicate recordings but do not suppress a valid exact song merely because another song by its artist scored higher.

source_policy.deciding: Only pure_sonic rows backed by credible editorial, artist, musicological, or listener-consensus evidence.
source_policy.diagnostic: Samples/interpolations, legal/plagiarism disputes, covers/remixes/adaptations, and weak or unsubstantiated assertions remain versioned but cannot affect model selection.
source_policy.retrieval_date: Every source records the date it was retrieved.

category_definitions.pure_sonic: Credible editorial, artist, musicological, or listener evidence identifies specific sonic resemblance without a sample, interpolation, cover/remix, or legal/plagiarism dispute.
category_definitions.sample_interpolation: Literal sampled, quoted, or interpolated musical material; diagnostic only.
category_definitions.legal_plagiarism: Similarity is framed by a copyright, plagiarism, rights-holder, or settlement dispute; diagnostic only.
category_definitions.cover_remix: The relationship is a cover, remix, contrafact, acknowledged rework, or adaptation; diagnostic only.
category_definitions.weak_unsubstantiated: Only an unsupported/dead sound-alike database or weak listicle assertion was found; diagnostic only.

confirmation_freeze.baseline_guardrail: Append all quality-filtered frozen-baseline top-ten items before learned tail candidates, preserving every baseline Recall@50 hit observed in the final set.
confirmation_freeze.tail_score: 0.25 * z(EfficientNet-B0 PCA64 cosine) + 0.75 * z(calibrated LAION-CLAP PCA64 cosine) + 0.20 * z(Wikipedia song-article evidence) + 0.10 * z(specific-song-page existence)
confirmation_freeze.training_boundary: All representation compression, weights, source-independent priors, and centroid choices use only non-held-out rows or public data. No F01-F20 identity, target, rank, or external-validation response is a serving feature.
confirmation_freeze.selection_disclosure: The final set was reused to compare sequential challengers as explicitly requested; it is pair/artist-disjoint and label-free for training, but is not claimed as a once-opened statistical test. Pair bootstrap uncertainty is therefore reported without a significance claim.
